name: The Back Nine Golf | Orlando - Winter Garden

faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf likely provides club rentals, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for familiarity.

faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be permitted, but the venue likely offers a full bar and food service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.answer: Family-friendly policies are not specified, but it's advisable to contact the venue directly for inquiries about children's participation.
